scope: D/E/F group round 3 China Sports Lottery discussion plan
execution_boundary: Execute only after matchday official lineups, final injuries, odds, and sales status are rechecked.
If sales remain suspended, a market is not open, or lineup assumptions break, the related item amount is 0.
This is not a profit promise or mandatory betting instruction.

budget.note: Each plan is an alternative 100 yuan template; do not stack all three.

matches.model_note: Germany still has the higher win side, but rotation and tempo control are major third-round risks; representative score 0-1.
Cote d'Ivoire has the stronger side, but a draw-enough state can reduce late attacking intensity; representative score 0-1.
Netherlands advantage is clear, but +2 handicap should not be read as a simple big-win confirmation; representative score 0-2/0-1.
Market is hotter on Japan than the model; Sweden must chase points, so Sweden +1 cover is preferred for risk control.
Model is 35.5/34.0/30.5 with representative score 1-1; Paraguay need a win but a two-goal win threshold is high.
USA has the higher win side, but already being first in the group creates rotation and tempo-control risk; representative score 1-2.

items.selection: 058 Japan vs Sweden, handicap -1, away win: Sweden +1 cover
items.reason: Japan is hotter in the market than in the model; Sweden still has a must-chase branch.
items.risk: Japan early goal plus Sweden chase can lead to Japan winning by 2.

items.selection: 059 Paraguay vs Australia, handicap -1, away win: Australia +1 cover
items.reason: The model centers around 1-1, and Paraguay winning by 2 is a high threshold.
items.risk: Paraguay can break the protection if Australia injuries hurt the wide defense.

items.selection: 058 RQ away win x 059 RQ away win
items.reason: Both legs are protection against over-stretched favorite or must-win narratives.
items.risk: Any early goal can change the match script and break one leg.

items.reason: Germany is still the higher win side, but amount is capped because of third-round rotation risk.
items.risk: Rotation and Ecuador urgency can create a draw.

items.selection: 055 SPF away win x 059 RQ away win
items.reason: Combines one strength edge with one handicap-protection leg.
items.risk: Germany rotation or Paraguay two-goal win breaks the ticket.

items.selection: 058 RQ away win x 060 SPF away win
items.reason: Balances Japan handicap risk with the USA higher win side.
items.risk: USA rotation can turn the match into a draw; Japan can still win by 2.

items.selection: 055 SPF away win x 058 RQ away win x 059 RQ away win
items.reason: Small amount on the core directions with better payout elasticity.
items.risk: Three-leg parlays have low tolerance for one wrong script.

items.selection: 060 Turkey vs USA, handicap +1, draw: USA win by exactly 1
items.reason: Matches the 1-2 representative score and avoids overstating USA margin.
items.risk: Turkey avoid defeat or USA win by 2+.

items.selection: 056 Curacao vs Cote d'Ivoire, handicap +2, home win: Curacao +2 cover win
items.reason: Cote d'Ivoire can win without constantly chasing a large margin.
items.risk: Cote d'Ivoire early goals can push the match to a two-goal or larger margin.
Half-full-time odds not verified; cancel if unavailable or overpriced.
Half-full-time odds not verified; cancel if unavailable or overpriced.
Half-full-time odds not verified; cancel if unavailable or overpriced.

items.selection: 055 Germany win x 058 Sweden +1 cover x 059 Australia +1 cover x 060 USA win
items.reason: Uses two lower-price win sides and two handicap-protection legs across 11 combinations.
items.risk: A single rotation-driven upset can damage many combinations.

items.selection: 055 Germany win x 056 Curacao +2 cover win x 058 Sweden +1 cover x 059 Australia +1 cover
items.reason: Replaces a big-favorite margin chase with Curacao +2 protection.
items.risk: If Cote d'Ivoire wins by 2+, this combo cluster is exposed.

items.selection: 058 RQ away win x 059 RQ away win
items.reason: Keeps the two main handicap-protection legs as a stabilizer inside a volatile plan.
items.risk: Japan or Paraguay can still break the handicap.

items.selection: 057 Tunisia vs Netherlands, handicap +2, draw: Netherlands win by exactly 2
items.reason: Matches the 0-2 model path without chasing Netherlands by 3+.
items.risk: Netherlands rotation leads to a smaller win, or Tunisia collapse leads to a larger margin.

items.selection: 060 Turkey vs USA, handicap +1, draw: USA win by exactly 1
items.risk: Turkey avoid defeat or USA win by more than one.

avoid_list.reason: Third-round rotation and tempo control make low price favorites more fragile than the price suggests.

avoid_list.direction: Using 057 Netherlands handicap away win as a main-bank anchor
avoid_list.reason: That requires a Netherlands win by 3+, while the model center is closer to 0-2 or 0-1.

avoid_list.direction: Using 058 Japan win or handicap win as a parlay core
avoid_list.reason: The market is hotter on Japan than the model, and Sweden still has a must-chase branch.
The model centers around 1-1 and Australia has draw-management space.

avoid_list.direction: Writing ordinary SPF picks for 056 or 057 before the market opens
avoid_list.reason: The ordinary SPF markets are not open in the provided snapshot.

pre_match_recheck: Official T-75 lineups for Germany, Netherlands, USA, Japan, Sweden, Paraguay, Australia, Cote d'Ivoire.
Final injury and suspension confirmation, especially Paraguay/Australia wide-player availability and Cote d'Ivoire defender status.
Sales status and market availability for SPF, RQSPF, correct score, and half-full-time.
Odds movement, especially if Germany, Japan, or USA prices shorten further.

recommendation_order.use_case: Prefer balance between payout and dispersion.
Accept higher parlay volatility for entertainment-oriented upside.
